service.name: LinkedIn API
service.description_for_ai: Professional network API. 1B+ professionals. Access user profiles, company pages, job postings, share content. Use for professional profile lookup, job search integration, company info, B2B use cases.

auth.how_to_get: Create app at https://www.linkedin.com/developers/ — requires company page
auth.cost: Free basic access. Some endpoints require LinkedIn partnership.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get LinkedIn profile of the authenticated user: name, headline, location, summary, experience. Requires user to log in with LinkedIn.
Share a post on LinkedIn on behalf of authenticated user or company page.

agent_hints.restricted: LinkedIn API is significantly more restricted than other social APIs. Many endpoints require LinkedIn partnership approval.
agent_hints.oauth_scope: Common scopes: openid profile email (for login), w_member_social (for posting), r_liteprofile (for profile reading).
agent_hints.urn_format: LinkedIn uses URN identifiers: urn:li:person:abc123 for users, urn:li:organization:123456 for companies.
agent_hints.best_use: LinkedIn API is best for: OAuth social login, sharing company updates, basic profile info. Job search API requires partnership.
